title: rhododendron subroseum
intro: Rhododendron subroseum, also known as the pink azalea, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the rhododendron family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Rhododendron subroseum include its ability to treat fever, sore throat, and digestive issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic to aid in wound healing. Rhododendron subroseum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties.
